programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo rescues an elderly man from a mine cave-in.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo befriends a 3-year-old girl who has strayed from her parents' camper in a wilderness area.

programme.title: Timber Titans
programme.desc: Storms and mechanical breakdowns halt a team; In the Fraser Valley, floods trap the Peters' machine and block the construction site.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A gibbon finds his song; platypuses return to a national park.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Intense weather keeps most of the boats tied up, but one captain goes AWOL to score big.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo rescues an elderly man from a mine cave-in.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo befriends a 3-year-old girl who has strayed from her parents' camper in a wilderness area.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob visits some rescued pitbulls as they go through K-9 police training; Danielle says goodbye to a long-term resident.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Danielle searches for the owners of a wandering horse; a family hopes to adopt two bonded dogs.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: The team heads to North Carolina to help dogs impacted by a hurricane; three rescued sheep arrive at the farm.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob and Danielle head to Israel to rescue dogs from a shelter; a couple hoping to adopt needs theirs cat's approval; a visit with the farm chickens.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: A dog with two broken legs needs surgery; a trainer works with Angel; a senior dog gets a new home.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: The team helps with the canine over-population in Manitoba.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at what it takes to run the Taronga Zoo Sydney, Australia's largest zoo, located on the shores of Sydney Harbour.

programme.title: Biggest & Baddest
programme.desc: Niall meets activists and scientists working together to place America's wild horses into safe havens.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Bushmen Rod and Les go on a risky mission to reopen an abandoned mine; the Young Guns head underground for the first time to look for pineapple opals.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Rookie team the Young Guns run into trouble as they look for pineapple opals; the Cooke Bros race against time hunting opals on another miner's claim; the Fire Crew run themselves broke.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: The captains help each other catch blue gold at the halfway point of blue fin season.

programme.desc: Maya the lioness complains about a broken tooth and needs to go to the dentist; newcomer Eve receives swimming lessons from her fellow seals.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo gets a paraplegic boy to take part in a Frisbee-throwing contest.

programme.desc: A night watchman and his German shepherd are framed for theft.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.sub-title: Dogs Just Want to Have Fun
programme.desc: Dr. Keri tries out some traditional and new dog sports to find out how to keep dogs fit and mentally healthy.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri treats ailments specific to cats, and then sees firsthand how those feline issues can also be a concern for big cats like cougars.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: When a sick puppy arrives at RAPS, Alison goes above and beyond to save his life; a major accident at the Thrift Store sets the pickers on a new course.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: Sami, a rescue dog from China, has a dangerous intestinal condition; a cat, aptly named Tumbleweed, can't stay balanced on his feet.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at what it takes to run the Taronga Zoo, Sydney, Australia's largest zoo, located on the shores of Sydney Harbour.

programme.title: Mega Zoo
programme.desc: A wombat named Daisy is suffering from mysterious health issues; transporting a giraffe calf; a secret hidden underneath the Melbourne Zoo is revealed.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: A lack of water sends Max and Glenn out into the wilderness to hunt sapphires; Anthony and Jodie Mifsud take a costly wrong turn.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: Todd and Brianna struggle mixing parenthood and sapphire hunting; Old Timers Ray and Paul might be digging in the wrong spot while Max and Glenn bring in the drillers.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The wind wreaks havoc on the Outer Banks, but with over half the quota caught, the fleet takes bigger risks than ever.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps a paroled ex-convict who is uncertain about what to do when he learns of a drug ring.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps a struggling artist who has become involved with some hilarious gangsters.
